summary: Fixed HistoryChart time range selector buttons (7D/15D/30D/All) that were not responding to clicks. Added type='button', pointerEvents: 'auto', onMouseDown preventDefault, and userSelect: 'none' to ensure proper click handling.
fixes_applied: Added type='button' to buttons (prevents form submission behavior)
Added pointerEvents: 'auto' (ensures click events are registered)
Added onMouseDown preventDefault (prevents unwanted default behavior)
next_steps: Run npm run start to test the button clicks
Verify clicking 7D/15D/30D/All buttons changes the displayed data
